# Add CMake-only content below the preserve marker at the end of this file.    #

# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

iree_add_all_subdirs()

set(_loom_compile_platform_copts "")
if(LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_copts "-DLOOM_COMPILE_HAVE_AMDGPU=1")
endif()
if(LOOM_EMIT_IREE_VM)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_copts "-DLOOM_COMPILE_HAVE_IREE_VM=1")
endif()
if(LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_copts "-DLOOM_COMPILE_HAVE_SPIRV=1")
endif()
set(_loom_compile_platform_deps "")
if(LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::target::arch::amdgpu::provider)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::tooling::target::amdgpu::artifact_provider)
endif()
if(LOOM_EMIT_IREE_VM)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::tooling::execution::ireevm::candidate)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::tooling::execution::ireevm::provider)
endif()
if(LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::target::arch::spirv::provider)
  list(APPEND _loom_compile_platform_deps loom::tooling::target::spirv::artifact_provider)
endif()
loom_cc_binary(
  NAME
    loom-compile
  SRCS
    "loom-compile.c"
  COPTS
    ${_loom_compile_platform_copts}
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::tooling::flags
    iree::io::file_handle
    loom::error::diagnostic
    loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::tooling::compile::pipeline
    loom::tooling::config
    loom::tooling::execution::compile_options
    loom::tooling::execution::compile_report_capture
    loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
    loom::tooling::execution::hal::artifact
    loom::tooling::execution::hal::candidate
    loom::tooling::execution::session
    loom::tooling::io::file
    ${_loom_compile_platform_deps}
)

iree_execution_test_suite(
  NAME
    execution_test
  MANIFESTS
    "loom-compile.test.json"
  TOOLS
    "iree-run-module=iree::tools::iree-run-module"
    "loom-compile=::loom-compile"
  LABELS
    "hostonly"
)
